id.description: Stable id, e.g. xhs-001 / wechat-014 / zhihu-003

url.description: Public URL to fetch. Must be a permalink not a short link.

title_substr.description: A substring expected to appear in the extracted title (case-insensitive). Optional.

body_min_chars.description: Minimum body text length after extraction. Default 200 for zh.

image_min.description: Minimum number of images extracted. RedBook is image-heavy so usually ≥3.

tags_any.description: Any of these tags should appear in extracted metadata. Optional.

added_at.description: When this fixture was added. ISO date.

notes.description: Quirks or reasons this URL is in the corpus (e.g., long-tail edge case, lots of emoji, paywall content).

status.description: Drop fixtures that go 404 / paywall change. Mark deprecated, don't delete (audit trail).
